creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
sparc64, net-snmpd pkg_info | grep snmp
net-snmp-5.4.2.1    An extendability SNMP implementation

upgraded from net-snmp 5.4.1.2, and now cpu is pegged at 100%.


top shows pegged at 100% cpu. /usr/local/etc/rc.d/snmpd stop doesn't stop it.
needs a killall -9 snmpd.

nothing interesting in syslog.
